title: Rich Nutty Algerian Chicken Thigh Tagine
description: A weeknight Algerian dish featuring chicken thighs, with a rich nutty flavor and a pillowy texture, made with macrobiotic-friendly ingredients and a ferment, perfect for a weeknight dinner
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium heat
Add the chopped onion and cook until it is softened and lightly browned
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger and cook for 1 minute
Add the ground cumin, ground coriander, and cinnamon and cook for 1 minute
Add the chicken thighs and cook until they are browned on all sides
Add the chopped dried apricots and chickpeas
Pour in 1 cup of water and bring the mixture to a boil
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 30 minutes
Season the tagine with salt and pepper to taste
Serve the tagine hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley
Cook poultry to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F before serving.
